catalog_row.KeyFeatures: Four-quarter overlapping nominal contracts; relative real contract prices; inflation persistence; output-gap pressure; reduced-form VAR expectations; nominal-output policy experiments

status_row.notes: First-pass extraction from MinerU Markdown. Main QJE contracting equations are readable. Rep-MMB .mod includes later LWW/Fuhrer implementation details and was used only as implementation_cross_check. Dynare was not run.

validation.check: English derivation has all eight sections and (F1)
English and Chinese F-number counts match
validation.details: English references 55; Chinese references 55; unique equation labels 24.

unresolved_issues: Reconcile the Rep-MMB LWW-style interest-rate rule with the QJE nominal-output-growth policy experiment.
Confirm the source of the compact output-gap and term-structure equations used in the .mod.
Reconstructing the exact QJE covariance matrix and VAR equations is deferred.
Dynare runtime validation was not performed.
